string.description: Unquoted text value used for targets, prerequisites, commands, and variable values

variable.description: Make variable reference, expanded recursively (=) or simply (:=)

automatic_variable.description: Special variables set by make for each rule: target, first prereq, all prereqs, etc.

function.description: Built-in text transformation function like subst, patsubst, wildcard, foreach, call

target.description: Build target name followed by its dependency list and recipe commands

recipe.description: Tab-indented shell command executed to build a target, each line runs in a separate shell
